findings.location: ocr/page_314.md lines 19-25 — callout blockquote rendered as HTML entities
findings.jp_expected:
> 試験にはコレが出る！
>
> - コーポレートガバナンスとは...
findings.trace: The callout box was OCR'd and then markdown-escaped as HTML entity '>' instead of raw '>'. Additionally 'コレが' is again misread as 'つしが'. This is in narrative OCR only; the release output page_314.md contains clean structured term definitions with no blockquote artifacts.
findings.recommended_fix: Unescape > → > in OCR markdown output. Also apply callout correction rule 'つしが' → 'コレが'.
